# `agentctl run -f manifest.yaml` against a happy daemon.

mockd start
agentctl run -f manifest.yaml
stdout 'Started '
stdout 'pid=4242'
stdout 'policy: hosts:1 paths:0 timeout:0'
mockd assert-method-called RunAgent

-- manifest.yaml --
name: web-fetcher
command: ["/usr/bin/curl", "-fsSL", "https://example.com"]
allowed_hosts: ["example.com:443"]
allowed_paths: []
